title: Tick Control South Bronx | Expert Tick Removal Services $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in South Bronx, Bronx. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed experts. Call now for same-day service!
intro: South Bronx residents face increasing tick exposure in local parks, community gardens, and green spaces along the waterfront. Our professional tick control services protect homes, families, and pets from dangerous tick-borne illnesses including Lyme disease and Rocky Mountain spotted fever. We provide comprehensive treatment for South Bronx properties ranging from $125 to $325.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served South Bronx for years with expert tick elimination services tailored to urban neighborhoods. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments safe for children and pets, and we offer flexible scheduling to accommodate busy South Bronx families.
localContext: From the parks near Yankee Stadium to the green spaces along the Harlem River waterfront and community gardens throughout Mott Haven and Melrose, South Bronx has numerous areas where ticks thrive. We're familiar with the unique challenges of brownstones, multi-family buildings, and ground-floor apartments common throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: Are ticks really a problem in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, ticks are increasingly found in South Bronx parks, community gardens, and green spaces along the waterfront. They're brought in by wildlife, birds, and pets, making residential properties vulnerable. Areas near Mill Pond Park, St. Mary's Park, and along the Harlem River Greenway are particularly at risk.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in South Bronx range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer free inspections and customized quotes for South Bronx homes and apartment buildings.

faqs.question: Is tick treatment safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatment areas are safe for re-entry within 2-4 hours after application, and we provide specific safety instructions for your South Bronx property.

faqs.question: When is tick season in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in South Bronx from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be present year-round during mild winters. We recommend preventative treatments in early spring and regular monitoring throughout the warm months for complete protection.
